# How to Build Resilient Fraud Management Strategies

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Online businesses are once again facing disrupted consumer demand and purchasing behaviors, supply chain shortages, unchecked inflation, and global economic unrest. And as with any widespread economic uncertainty, fraudsters uncover opportunities to exploit blindspots, often driving fraud rates up across the board. But more fraud doesn’t have to mean more losses. Our new guide covers three Digital Trust & Safety strategies to equip risk teams with actionable ways to withstand economic turbulence.

Download the guide to explore:

*   How to maximize your budget and resources in the midst of changing fraud patterns.
*   Why reducing manual efforts, automating processes, and maximizing the use of existing tools will set teams up for success.
*   How Sift helps manage fraud while maintaining a positive return on investment and recouping revenue that would otherwise be lost to evolving abuse.

### Download the Ebook

Get the Ebook

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
